lede: A look at January 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Andrew Nembhard and Simon Richter, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: First impeachment of Donald Trump
events.desc: The first impeachment of Donald Trump formally moves into its trial phase in the United States Senate.

events.title: Turkish Airlines Flight 6491
events.desc: Turkish Airlines Flight 6491 crashes into a residential area near Manas International Airport in Kyrgyzstan, killing 39 people.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Adolf Hitler moves into his underground bunker, the so-called Führerbunker.

events.title: TWA Flight 3
events.desc: Crash of TWA Flight 3, killing all 22 aboard, including film star Carole Lombard.

events.title: League of Nations
events.desc: The League of Nations holds its first council meeting in Paris, France.

events.title: Srinivasa Ramanujan
events.desc: Indian mathematician Srinivasa Ramanujan writes his first letter to G. H. Hardy at Cambridge, stating without proof various formulae involving integrals, infinite series, and continued fractions, beginning a long correspondence between the two as well as widespread recognition of Ramanujan's results.

events.title: Pendleton Civil Service Reform Act
events.desc: The Pendleton Civil Service Reform Act, establishing the United States Civil Service, is enacted by Congress.

events.title: Peninsular War
events.desc: Peninsular War: The British defeat the French at the Battle of La Coruña.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: Battle of Cape St. Vincent.

events.title: Augustus
events.desc: Gaius Julius Caesar Octavianus is granted the title Augustus by the Roman Senate, marking the beginning of the Roman Empire.

deaths.text: Kalevi Sorsa, Finnish politician 34th Prime Minister of Finland
Marshall Field, American businessman and philanthropist, founded Marshall Field's
Joseph Vaz, Indian-Sri Lankan priest and saint

observances.text: Christian feast day: Solemnity of Mary, Mother of God (Coptic Church)
